questions.statement: We'll use WebSockets for real-time updates between the daemon and TUI
questions.rationale: Lower latency than polling, and the existing infra already supports WS connections

questions.question: Which state management approach for the TUI?
questions.rationale: Need to decide before implementing the render loop

questions.question: Any constraints on the deployment target we should know about?

questions.statement: Visual context generation will use Haiku with full conversation context via prompt caching
questions.rationale: First call pays the input cost, subsequent calls hit the cache making them nearly free
